title: Apple just gave a clue that a big AI acquisition may be in the cards
summary: Apple has retired its net-cash-neutral financial target, signaling a potential shift toward larger acquisitions. Analysts view this move as a possible indicator that the company may pursue significant deals in AI and other areas beyond its typical smaller investments.
content: With Apple officially retiring its net-cash-neutral target, some suspect the company will look to conduct more transformative M&A, beyond the smaller deals it made in the past.

zh.title: 苹果暗示可能进行大规模人工智能收购
zh.summary: 苹果已放弃其净现金中立财务目标，表明公司可能转向进行更大规模的收购。分析师认为这一举措可能表明该公司可能在人工智能和其他领域进行重大交易，超越其典型的小规模投资。

title: Spirit Airlines could shut down overnight. Here's what travelers need to know
summary: Spirit Airlines faces potential overnight shutdown, affecting ticketed passengers who need to understand their options and passenger protections. The article provides guidance on what travelers should do if the carrier ceases operations.
content: What travelers who are ticketed on Spirit Airlines need to know if the carrier shuts down.

zh.title: 精神航空公司可能一夜间关闭。旅客需要了解什么
zh.summary: 精神航空公司面临一夜间关闭的可能性,影响持票乘客需要了解其选择和乘客保护。该文章为旅客提供了如果承运人停止运营应该采取的措施指导。

title: Bard College President Leon Botstein retiring after Jeffrey Epstein ties detailed
summary: Bard College President Leon Botstein is retiring after facing mounting pressure related to revealed communications with Jeffrey Epstein documented by DOJ releases. His departure ends a lengthy tenure amid the scandal's fallout.
content: Bard College's long-time leader Leon Botstein has faced pressure since the DOJ released documents about his communications with Jeffrey Epstein.

zh.title: 巴德学院院长莱昂·博特斯坦因与杰弗里·爱泼斯坦关系曝光后退休
zh.summary: 巴德学院院长莱昂·博特斯坦在面临与杰弗里·爱泼斯坦的来往通信问题日益增大的压力后退休,这些通信由司法部发布的文件记录。他的离职在丑闻的余波中结束了其长期的任期。
